# ocarina.trade

Peer-to-peer OTC swap site for NFTs and tokens. No backend, no fees, no middleman.

## What it does
- Atomic swaps of NFTs (ERC-721, ERC-1155), whitelisted ERC-20 tokens, and native ETH
- Multi-asset swaps (multiple items per side)
- Off-chain Seaport signatures, registered onchain via OTCZone for discovery
- Optional taker restriction, expiration, and memo

## Supported chains
Ethereum, Base, Polygon, Ink

## How it works
1. Connect wallet, choose counterparty (or leave open)
2. Select what you're offering and what you want
3. Sign the order (offchain) and register it onchain (one transaction)
4. Share the link with your counterparty
5. They review, approve, and fill the order (one onchain transaction)

## Key properties
- No backend, no database — all state is onchain or in the URL
- No admin, no owner, no upgradeability
- Assets stay in wallets until atomic swap execution
- Open source (GPL-3.0-only)
- Built on Seaport 1.6 (OpenSea's audited swap protocol)

## Links
- Site: https://ocarina.trade
- Twitter: https://x.com/ocarinatrade
